response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory core competencies for this role. C++ experience is limited to approximately 6 months at National Instruments (2014-2015), far short of the required 5-10 years. The resume demonstrates primary strength in modern full-stack, web, and D Lang development. No Windows platform specialization or capital markets/fixed income domain experience is evident, eliminating both mandatory domain pathways. While communication skills and Java/CI-CD knowledge are assets, they cannot substitute for the foundational technical requirements.
strengths: Demonstrated teaching and mentoring ability through multiple workshops and open-source contributions
Polyglot engineer showing adaptability across multiple languages and technical domains
CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure experience from multiple senior-level roles
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ experience versus the mandatory 5-10 year requirement
No evidence of Windows platform development or SQL Server/Oracle specialization
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain knowledge
